error_anchors_after: [W514 09:32:04.215200341 compiler_depend.ts:577] Warning: NPU warning, error code is 507035[Error]: | [Error]: The vector core execution is abnormal. | EH9999: Inner Error! | rtDeviceSynchronizeWithTimeout execute failed, reason=[vector core exception][FUN
natural_language: When the NPU error code 507035 "vector core execution abnormal" appears with a correctness failure, do not directly index into LocalTensor with `aLocal[i*K_+k]` and `cLocal[i*N_+j]=sum`; instead access elements via `aLocal.GetValue(i*K_+k)`, `bLocal.GetValue(k*N_+j)`, and `cLocal.SetValue(i*N_+j, sum)`.
